value.li: Bottle caps are the currency of the wasteland. Traders across the factions will accept them in exchange for goods and services.
VATS slows time and lets you target specific body parts. Aim for the legs to cripple enemies, or the head for maximum damage.
Brahmin are two-headed mutated cattle that can serve as pack animals and provide milk, a rare luxury in the wasteland.
Pre-war technology is scattered across the wasteland. Researching pre-war advancements can unlock powerful equipment your enemies won't expect.
Energy weapons deal high damage but require specialized ammunition. Establish a supply chain before arming your colony with laser rifles.
The Enclave considers itself the true continuation of the United States government. They will use that authority to justify anything.
